[@microsoft/fast-element/hydration.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ViewController](../fast-element.viewcontroller/index.html) &gt; [isHydrated](../fast-element.viewcontroller.ishydrated/index.html)

## ViewController.isHydrated property

Resolves `true` after prerendered content has been hydrated, `false` when client-side rendered or hydration not enabled.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isHydrated?: Promise<boolean>;
```
